steps.title: Find the antecedent
steps.content: The blank refers back to “many even-toed ungulates,” which is plural.

steps.title: Match the number
steps.content: “These animals” (B) matches the plural antecedent and functions as the object of “prevent.” Options A and C are singular (don't match the plural number); option D is plural but uses a possessive form that doesn't fit the structure “prevent ___ from joining.” That matches choice B — B is correct.
